message:
fix(polyfills): remove duplicate IIFE closing from cluster.js

cluster.js had duplicate code that closed the core.js IIFE:
- `globalThis._polyfillsInitialized = true;`
- `})();`

This conflicted with end.js which also has the IIFE closing.
When tree-shaking included cluster.js in the middle of module order,
modules prepended after it ended up outside the IIFE, causing
SyntaxError and modules failing to register.

The fix removes the duplicate closing from cluster.js since end.js
handles it properly. Also added node: alias for node-fetch.
